PreCommit.command: cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && python -m ruff check src/ tests/ --no-fix

cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && grep -rn --include='*.py' 'print(' src/ | grep -v '# noqa' | grep -v 'def print' && echo 'ERROR: Debug print() statements found in src/. Remove them or add # noqa comment.' && exit 1 || true
PreCommit.description: Check for debug print statements in src/

PreCommit.command: cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '(data/|digit_vigilance_.*\.json|pvt_data_.*\.json|cvt_.*\.json|IRB.*\.pdf)' && echo 'ERROR: Participant data or IRB files staged for commit. Remove with git reset HEAD <file>.' && exit 1 || true
PreCommit.description: Block participant data and IRB files from being committed

PreCommit.command: cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && grep -rn --include='*.py' '/mnt/\|C:\\Users\|/home/' src/ && echo 'ERROR: Hardcoded paths found in src/. Use relative paths or config.' && exit 1 || true
cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARNING: Tests failed or pytest not installed. Run: pip install pytest'
